content: A Fixed Deposit (FD) is a savings product offered by banks and NBFCs where you deposit a lump sum for a fixed period at a guaranteed interest rate.
simple_explanation: FD ek safe investment hai jahan aap paise bank me rakhte ho aur badle me fixed interest milta hai.
example: Agar aap ₹10,000 FD me rakhte ho 1 saal ke liye 7% pe, to aapko ₹700 milega.
hinglish: FD me aap paise lock karte ho aur bank aapko extra paisa deta hai.

content: FD interest can be simple or compound. Most Indian banks compound interest quarterly.
simple_explanation: Interest matlab bank aapko extra paisa deta hai FD karne par.
example: ₹1,00,000 FD pe 7% interest pe aapko approx ₹7,000 milta hai 1 saal me.
hinglish: Bank aapke paise use karta hai aur badle me aapko interest deta hai.

content: FD tenures range from 7 days to 10 years. Longer tenure usually gives higher returns.
simple_explanation: Tenure matlab kitne time ke liye aap FD kar rahe ho.
hinglish: Tenure matlab paise kitne time ke liye lock rahenge.

content: Bank FDs are insured up to Rs 5 lakh per depositor per bank under DICGC.
simple_explanation: FD safe hota hai kyunki government ₹5 lakh tak paisa protect karti hai.
example: Agar bank fail ho jaye, tab bhi ₹5 lakh tak paisa safe rahega.
hinglish: FD me risk bahut kam hota hai.

content: FD interest is taxable as per your income slab. TDS applies above Rs 40,000.
simple_explanation: FD pe jo interest milta hai uspe tax lagta hai.
example: Agar ₹50,000 interest mila to bank TDS kaat sakta hai.
hinglish: FD ka interest tax free nahi hota.

content: You can break FD early but a penalty is charged by banks.
simple_explanation: Aap FD time se pehle tod sakte ho, par thoda loss hoga.
example: 7% FD todne par 6% interest mil sakta hai.
hinglish: FD jaldi todoge to kam paisa milega.

content: FD rates in India range between 6% to 9% depending on bank and tenure.
simple_explanation: Different banks alag interest dete hain FD pe.
example: Small finance banks 8-9% tak de sakte hain.
hinglish: Zyada interest ke liye different banks compare karo.

content: FD gives guaranteed returns but lower than mutual funds.
simple_explanation: FD safe hai, mutual funds risky but zyada return de sakte hain.
hinglish: FD safe game hai, mutual fund thoda risky game hai.

content: You can book FD online or offline through bank.
simple_explanation: FD banana easy hai, bas amount aur tenure choose karna hota hai.
example: Mobile app se 5 minute me FD open ho jata hai.
hinglish: Net banking se easily FD kar sakte ho.

content: Senior citizens get higher FD interest rates.
simple_explanation: 60+ age walon ko extra interest milta hai.
example: 7% FD pe seniors ko 7.5% mil sakta hai.
hinglish: Senior citizens ko FD me extra fayda milta hai.
